string.text: Attachments in Stashes
Attachments in Stashes
Allow Traders to sell T1 Attachments and gun kits

If enabled, traders will be able to sell Tier 1 attachments and basic gun kits (like Kobra sights, PBS silencers, etc.). Higher tier attachments are always banned. \n \nNOTE: If you toggle this setting mid-game, you must wait for traders to restock (usually 24-48 in-game hours) before the new items appear.
Replace Default Quest Stash
If enabled, whenever a blue stash is triggered from completing a quest, it will block the default (white/yellow) stash from spawning for that specific quest completion to prevent double stashes.
--- DARK BLUE STASH ---
Dark Blue Stash: Min Quests
Minimum number of quests required to trigger the Dark Blue (attachments) stash.
Dark Blue Stash: Max Quests
Maximum number of quests required to trigger the Dark Blue (attachments) stash.
--- LIGHT BLUE STASH ---
Light Blue Stash: Min Quests
Minimum number of quests required to trigger the Light Blue (kits + attachments) stash.
Light Blue Stash: Max Quests
Maximum number of quests required to trigger the Light Blue (kits + attachments) stash.
--- BLUE STASH FROM DEAD STALKERS ---
Chance to get a blue stash from Rookie/Novice/Trainee stalker (%)
Chance to get a blue stash when looting Rookie, Novice, Trainee or Experienced stalkers.
Chance to get a blue stash from Veteran/Professional stalker (%)
Chance to get a blue stash when looting Veteran or Professional stalkers.
Chance to get a blue stash from Expert/Master/Legend stalker (%)
Chance to get a blue stash when looting Expert, Master or Legend stalkers.
--- BLUE STASH FROM PDA ---
Chance to get a blue stash from a PDA (%)
Chance to get a blue stash when reading an unlocked PDA.
